_comment: Brand style guide for Fly Horizons — use this file to generate flyers, social posts, or any visual content consistent with the brand identity.

brand.name: Fly Horizons
brand.type: Hélitreuillage et vols en hélicoptère privés, Belgique
brand.style_reference: Rivian, Linear, Arc — premium minimal éditorial

navy.usage: Main dark background, headlines, footer. The dominant dark color.

gold.usage: Primary CTA, eyebrow labels, accent on key title words, price tags, badges.

light_gray.usage: Alternate section backgrounds, testimonial card backgrounds.

colors.rule: Only 3 colors dominate any design: navy, gold, white. Never introduce new accent colors.

typography.font_family: Poppins (Google Fonts) — sole typeface for all text

eyebrow_label.usage: Short label above every section title (e.g. 'NOS VOLS', 'RÉSERVATION', 'CONTACT')

rules: Titles (H1/H2) are always weight 900 — no exceptions.
Gold accent is used only on key words within a title, not the full title.
Eyebrow labels are always uppercase, gold, widely tracked.

visual_style.philosophy: Confident, spacious, editorial. Big headlines that own the page. No decorative clutter. Premium without being cold.
visual_style.layout: Generous whitespace. Full-bleed navy sections alternating with white or light-gray sections.
visual_style.transitions: SVG wave shapes between navy and light sections — smooth organic curve, not a hard line.
visual_style.container: Max width 1400px, centered, with generous horizontal padding.

cards.product_cards: Photo-dominant (aspect ratio 4:3 or 3:4). Dark gradient overlay from bottom. White text. Gold price.
cards.testimonial_cards: Light gray background (#f5f5f7), gold top accent bar, body text at 70% opacity.

imagery.mood: Aerial views, golden hour light, Belgian countryside and Ardennes, dramatic sky, helicopter in flight or on the ground.
imagery.photography_style: Rich, cinematic, warm tones. Not flat or desaturated.
imagery.angle: Low altitude aerial shots preferred. Horizon line visible.
imagery.avoid: Stock-looking photos, blue-sky-only compositions with no ground, overly saturated HDR.

generic_rules: Always include: brand name 'Fly Horizons', gold eyebrow label, bold headline, short CTA.
Dark (navy) background flyers: white headline, one gold accent word, ghost button CTA.
Light background flyers: navy headline, gold eyebrow, navy CTA button with gold background.
Never use more than 2 typefaces — use only Poppins at different weights.
Price or duration badge: dark circle/pill with gold text, positioned top-left of product image.

recommended_compositions.name: Hero dark (paysage)
recommended_compositions.background: Full-bleed aerial photo with dark navy overlay (opacity ~60%)
elements: Top-left: 'FLY HORIZONS' logotype in white Poppins 700
Center: Eyebrow label in gold uppercase + tracking
Center: Large H1 headline (2 lines max) in white Poppins 900
One keyword in the headline colored #F2B705

recommended_compositions.name: Produit vol (carré)
elements: Bottom gradient overlay: black/90 to transparent (bottom-to-top)
Top-left badge: '45 MIN' in gold Poppins 900 on black/40 blur pill
Bottom-left: Product name in white Poppins 700
Bottom-right: Small gold arrow or CTA

recommended_compositions.name: Témoignage (story)
elements: Body: Quote text in #1e2535, Poppins 400, large size
Bottom: Name in #0b2238 Poppins 700 + location/date in gold Poppins 600 small
Corner: Small 'Fly Horizons' wordmark in navy

recommended_compositions.name: Offre promotionnelle (format portrait A4)
recommended_compositions.background: Navy #0b2238 full bleed with subtle aerial photo texture at low opacity
elements: Top: Eyebrow 'OFFRE SPÉCIALE' in gold uppercase
Center: Bold headline Poppins 900 white, 2–3 lines
Center: One line of detail text in white/70
Center: Price or discount in gold, very large
Bottom: Gold CTA button + website URL in white/50 small

voice.pilot_steps_personal: Romain (third person) — 'Romain confirme votre créneau', 'Romain analyse votre route'

style_rules: No em-dashes (— or –). Use commas, colons, semicolons, periods instead.
No AI-sounding phrases: 'il convient de noter', 'dans ce contexte', 'ainsi que'.
Short, confident sentences. One idea per sentence.
CTAs: active verb + concrete benefit. Examples: 'Réserver mon vol', 'Voir les disponibilités', 'Découvrir les vols'.
headline_examples: Votre vol, votre route, votre moment.
Le cadeau qui restera pour toujours.

dont_list: No blobs, circles or decorative background shapes
No heavy drop shadows — maximum 0 8px 32px rgba(11,34,56,0.11)
No multiple decorative borders on a single element
No large quotation marks (7rem+) in testimonials
No font weight below 900 for main headlines
No colors outside the defined palette — especially no bright blues, reds, or greens
No busy or cluttered compositions — whitespace is a feature, not a waste
No lowercase-only or all-caps (except eyebrow labels) in body text
No gradients on backgrounds except: navy-to-dark-navy in hero, or photo overlays
No rounded corners smaller than 10px on interactive elements

dalle_prompt_templates._note: Use these as base prompts for DALL-E or Midjourney image generation.
dalle_prompt_templates.aerial_golden_hour: Aerial drone photograph over Belgian countryside at golden hour, warm amber light, green fields and forest, small villages, dramatic horizon, cinematic color grading, no text overlay, 4:3 aspect ratio, editorial photography style
dalle_prompt_templates.helicopter_in_flight: Helicopter flying low over Belgian Ardennes landscape, golden hour lighting, rich warm tones, dramatic sky with light clouds, aerial perspective, cinematic quality, no text, wide angle
dalle_prompt_templates.interior_cockpit: Modern helicopter cockpit interior, pilot in uniform, aerial view through windshield showing Belgian landscape below, warm natural light, premium aesthetic, shallow depth of field, no text
dalle_prompt_templates.landing_field: Helicopter on a private landing pad in a Belgian meadow, green grass, golden hour, luxury feel, no people, clean composition, premium editorial style, no text
